reviews.comment: A lot of people stop there because it's half way between Corrientes and Posadas, but the restrooms are very small, not clean. The rest area - green area- is OK.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMzZtbjhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar, fácil acceso con sanitarios y un shop muy surtido. Con camping al lado para almorzar y descansar, con bancos, mesas y parrillas

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, easily accessible with restrooms and a well-stocked shop. There's a campsite next door for lunch and relaxation, with benches, tables, and grills.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneElQcEt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios . La atención de los plateros muy buena. El shop muy completo con precios moderados . Recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Clean bathrooms. The silversmiths' service was excellent. The shop was very complete with moderate prices. Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURROVB6Mm9nRRAB
